series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of but is not limited to, applications, renewal forms or correspondence associated with an appraisal management company license. These records may contain tax identification numbers which are not a matter of public record pursuant to 26 USC Section 6103 and Ohio Revised Code Section 149.43(A)(1)(dd).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper records are imaged and indexed to a computer. Upon confirmation that the paper copy was imaged and indexed properly, then the paper copy is destroyed. ; Electronic: Any records imaged and indexed to a machine readable format are to be retained one year after the expiration of the license and the records are to be destroyed. ; Microform: Any records on microform are to be retained one year after the expiration of the license and then the microfiche is destroyed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred
